steps.title: Find the slope from the constant rate of change in the table
steps.content:
From the table, each unit increase in $x$ corresponds to a constant decrease in $g(x)$:
  • From $(1, 46)$ to $(2, 43)$: change of $-3$
  • From $(2, 43)$ to $(3, 40)$: change of $-3$

The slope is $m = -3$.

steps.title: Use a point to solve for $b$ in $g(x) = mx + b$
steps.content:
Substitute the point $(1, 46)$:

$$46 = -3(1) + b$$$$b = 49$$

The y-intercept is 49.
